name: Coretronic Corporation
summary: Coretronic Corporation engages in the research, development, production, and marketing of projectors, backlights, and flat panel display related products in Taiwan and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Energy-Saving Products, Image Products and Brand, and Optical Components. It provides automobile displays, tablets, notebooks, laptops, and liquid crystal displays (LCDs) and LCD TV backlight modules; panel modules, electronic whiteboard modules, and semi-systems; and system solutions for medical, educational, ATM, point of sales, and public digital splicing displays. The company also offers digital projectors and video image signals for large-screen image projections, as well as interactive modules, smart connectors, edge blending and image warping processors, and image signal processing boxes; and imaging product solutions for computer data and projection, digital signage, screen blending, interactive experience, and smart connection for video image signals. In addition, it provides electronic components; batteries; computers and its peripheral devices; electronic materials and appliances; lighting applications; optical devices; data storage and processing equipment; and wireless communications equipment. Further, the company engages in the intelligent cloud, IT information, intelligent applications, and platform development related businesses of new media, as well as offers intelligent exercise and medical care related software and hardware products. Additionally, it provides intelligent display products and system integration solutions; image processing products; near-infrared spectrum solutions; unmanned aerial vehicle and intelligent robotics; MEMS sensors and modules; and augmented reality and mixed reality wearable display solutions. The company was formerly known as Optoma Corporation and changed its name to Coretronic Corporation in December 2001. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
